items.title: Trade-in for cash
items.summary: The Microsoft Store Trade-in Program lets you trade in eligible used devices like laptops, tablets, phones, and game consoles. Find your trade-in value and get cash back. Plus, your used device gets a new home, or it’s recycled in a responsible way.
